title: Arrowsmithia tenuifolia
taxonomy: Arrowsmithia tenuifolia is a rare and endangered plant species endemic to South Africa. It belongs to the family Asteraceae. The genus Arrowsmithia is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. The classification of Arrowsmithia tenuifolia is further supported by its unique leaf structure and growth habits. Arrowsmithia tenuifolia's classification is also significant for understanding the evolutionary history of the Asteraceae family.
